name: Broccoli Pizza Supreme
recipeIngredient: 16 oz. pkg. prebaked Italian bread shell, 12 inch
1/2 cup fresh spinach leaves, in thin strips
1/2 cup shredded Low Fat mozzarella cheese
1 tablespoon grated fresh Parmesan cheese (or Fat Free)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 450°F.
2. Bring 1/3 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan.
3. Add broccoli and leek. Return to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 3-4 minutes until broccoli is crisp-tender.
5. Drain well and set aside.
6. Place bread shell on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Spread pizza sauce evenly over the shell.
8. Sprinkle with spinach.
9. Arrange mushrooms, broccoli, and leek over spinach.
10. Sprinkle with mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.
11. Bake at 450°F for 9-11 minutes or until cheeses are melted.
